title: parallax detect result (DAEMON_INTERFACE §4)
_doc: The machine-readable result every conformant `detect` writes to <home>/<detect_result>. The suite asserts classify / zero-obligation on THIS, never on stdout wording. obligation = (tier 1 or tier 2 non-empty).

unclassified._doc: P2: triggered-but-unclassified files surfaced for manual review

next._doc: P2: the exact follow-up commands (read T1/T2 paths, then prepare); empty when zero-obligation
